Equity Research — Pre-Assessment

A 3-level evaluation to check your foundation, analytical thinking, and interview readiness for an equity research career. Total 21 questions.

Ready to begin?

You will complete 3 short rounds of MCQs. Results appear after each level, and a final overall assessment is shown at the end. No data is saved.
